description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a light purple color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is smooth and glossy, displaying a prominent black Apple logo in the center and a dual-camera module with two lenses and a flash in the top left corner. The sides are metallic and colored to match the back, with visible buttons for volume and power, as well as a SIM card slot. The device is thin and lightweight, with a glass front and back, and a metal frame. Its design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, light purple Apple smartphone with a large display, dual rear cameras, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a notch at the top and visible on-screen content.
description_view_1: Left edge view revealing the device's slim profile and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy surface, centered Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the thinness and additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, glossy and highly visible against the purple surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '16:11', the date 'Saturday, 4 November', a lock icon, and a cloudy, abstract wallpaper in blue and purple hues. Notification and status icons are visible at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged in a vertical module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both sides: two volume buttons and a mute switch on the left edge, and a power button on the right edge. All buttons are slim and elongated.
